# Context Kernel v0.1.11

This release adds the first MCP configuration layer while keeping Context Kernel's token-frugal runtime model intact.

## Highlights

- Added `akernel mcp add/list/show/enable/disable/remove`.
- Added workspace-local `.akernel/mcp.json` storage for stdio MCP server configuration.
- Added curated tool summaries with `--tool "name:description"`.
- Added compact MCP context summaries so enabled servers are visible to the agent without loading full tool schemas.

## Note

MCP v1 is configuration and context awareness only. Live stdio MCP JSON-RPC discovery and tool calls are intentionally deferred to the next bridge layer.

## Validation

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
